title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at SpiceJet Cargo

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at SpiceJet Cargo
jsonLd.description:
Join the SpiceJet Cargo family as a Fleet Manager in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About SpiceJet Cargo:
SpiceJet Cargo is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SpiceJet Cargo!
